title: Trump hits back at 'unpatriotic' vote after House rebukes him over Iran
summary_full: The lower chamber of Congress passed a measure that seeks to halt further military action, in a vote seen as largely symbolic.
summary_public: The lower chamber of Congress passed a measure that seeks to halt further military action, in a vote seen as largely symbolic.
